title: agropyron occidentale var. molle
intro: Agropyron occidentale var. molle, also known as Big Bluestem, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family, characterized by its tall, blue-green leaves and slender stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Big Bluestem include its ability to promote digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Big Bluestem can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or poultice, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
